title: LNG exposure is high and rising — especially in Asia
subtitle: LNG imports as share of total primary energy supply, %
editorialPoint: Asian economies built their energy systems on the assumption that LNG would keep flowing through Hormuz. Taiwan, Japan, and South Korea have the highest exposure — and the fewest alternatives.

data.note: Most exposed economy in the world

note: In at least nine countries, LNG imports make up over 10% of total energy supply. After the 2022 Ukraine crisis, European countries increased LNG imports to replace Russian pipeline gas — raising their exposure to the next shock. That shock is now here.
